svg.title: AML Pipeline Architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end AML pipeline from data source through bronze, silver, gold, ML, serving, and dashboard layers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the IBM AML dataset')
sendPrompt('How does the bronze layer work in aml-pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does the silver layer work in aml-pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does the gold layer work in aml-pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does MinIO store data in aml-pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does PostgreSQL store in aml-pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What endpoints does the FastAPI serving layer have?')
